_publications._publicationTitle: Modulation of Ras signaling alters the toxicity of hydroquinone, a benzene metabolite and component of cigarette smoke.

_contextSnippet: IRA2 was previously identified in a genome-wide screen for genes required for HQ tolerance and sensitivity to HQ was confirmed by analysis of the individual deletion strain
resourceName: BY4743 background diploid yeast deletion strains
details: ira2Δ strain showed increased sensitivity to hydroquinone treatment, confirming previous genome-wide screen results
